rules: [P1] For pure lookup tasks, return only the requested actual value or identifier in the exact format requested; never substitute placeholder codes.

[P1] Match on all provided patient identifiers in the relevant chart/order system before returning a record field or taking action; only use the task-approved not-found response after confirming no exact or qualifying match exists.

[P1] Distinguish lookup-only tasks from lookup-plus-action tasks; for result-based workflows, apply the exact requested lookback window, verify the exact test/source, use the most recent qualifying result by timestamp for all recency and abnormality decisions, take no action if no qualifying result exists, complete all triggered orders/follow-up steps before responding, and then report only the requested fields.

[P1] Apply the task’s protocol exactly, including abnormal-value thresholds, boundary values, dosing, and scheduled follow-up timing; compute relative times precisely and verify each scheduled order time before finishing.
[P1] Compute age from the charted DOB at query time; never estimate or guess demographic fields.
[P1] For pure documentation tasks, use the provided patient identifier to attach the user-supplied measurement to the correct chart and record it as stated.
[P1] Treat explicit referral requests as order-entry tasks, not retrieval tasks, and copy required free-text instructions verbatim into the referral note.
